title: Top College for B.Sc (Hons.) Forensic Science in Noida
content: Forensic science is primarily concerned with the application of scientific principles for the investigation of crime. Using the very latest in technology, forensic scientists convert the clues collected from a crime scene into evidence admissible in a court of law. It is the use or application of science in courts or legal proceedings. This is a challenging and interesting field for those who have are inquisitive and loves adventure. The objective of this course in B.Sc. Forensic Science is to create professionals who will apply their knowledge, in an essentially crime laboratory-based profession, to the investigation of crime. But the expertise of a forensic professional is also used in civil cases for issues like proving the validity of a signature on a will, to a claim of the products liability, to find out whether an industry is complying with environmental rules. XIIth with Science (PCB / PCM) with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 01 Multidisciplinary Forensic Foundation: Provide rigorous training in core forensic disciplines (biology, chemistry, physics) with emphasis on scientific methods, crime scene investigation techniques, and evidentiary analysis 02 Advanced Research Competency: Develop strong research skills through hands-on projects, dissertation work, and training in modern forensic technologies and analytical techniques 03 Specialized Technical Expertise: Equip students with specialized laboratory skills including DNA analysis, toxicology, fingerprint technology, and digital forensics applications 04 Legal and Ethical Framework: Instill understanding of criminal justice systems, courtroom procedures, and ethical responsibilities in forensic practice and evidence handling 05 Professional Readiness: Prepare graduates for forensic careers or advanced studies through industry collaborations, internships, and development of critical thinking and problem-solving abilities 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 02 03 01 Disciplinary Knowledge: Apply the knowledge of forensic concepts and applications in the field of criminal and civil investigations for the purposes of justice. 02 Problem Analysing: Develop an ability to analyse the evidences, identify and define appropriate solutions and enhance overall protocols and also equip with technological ability and problem solving skills. 03 Formulation and Design: Handle the advanced techniques of science and technology to analyze and design procedures and protocols for solving variety of problems related to real life cases.
